query:
-- 1. Add 'draft' to jobs status enum
ALTER TABLE jobs MODIFY COLUMN status ENUM('draft','planned','active','completed','cancelled') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'planned';

-- 2. Add grade and composite scoring columns to jobs
ALTER TABLE jobs
  ADD COLUMN grade ENUM('A+','A','B','C','D') NULL AFTER worthItScore,
  ADD COLUMN compositeScore DECIMAL(5,2) NULL AFTER grade,
  ADD COLUMN scoreState ENUM('estimated','travel_adjusted','receipt_adjusted','final') NULL DEFAULT 'estimated' AFTER compositeScore,
  ADD COLUMN scoreDimensions JSON NULL AFTER scoreState,
  ADD COLUMN transportCostRatio DECIMAL(5,4) NULL AFTER scoreDimensions,
  ADD COLUMN scoreVariance DECIMAL(5,2) NULL AFTER transportCostRatio,
  ADD COLUMN improvementTips JSON NULL AFTER scoreVariance,
  ADD COLUMN actualTravelToJobCost DECIMAL(8,2) NULL AFTER improvementTips,
  ADD COLUMN actualTravelHomeCost DECIMAL(8,2) NULL AFTER actualTravelToJobCost,
  ADD COLUMN startedAt TIMESTAMP NULL AFTER actualTravelHomeCost,
  ADD COLUMN draftExpiresAt TIMESTAMP NULL AFTER startedAt;

-- 3. Create mileage_log table
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS mileage_log (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  userId INT NOT NULL,
  jobId INT NULL,
  date VARCHAR(10) NOT NULL,
  startMileage DECIMAL(10,1) NULL,
  endMileage DECIMAL(10,1) NULL,
  distanceMiles DECIMAL(8,2) NOT NULL,
  purpose ENUM('delivery','reposition','personal') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'delivery',
  notes TEXT NULL,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);

-- 4. Create leaderboard_entries table
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS leaderboard_entries (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  userId INT NOT NULL,
  weekKey VARCHAR(10) NOT NULL,
  region VARCHAR(50) NULL,
  netEarnings DECIMAL(10,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  jobCount INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  totalMiles DECIMAL(10,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  avgGrade VARCHAR(3) NULL,
  rank INT NULL,
  optedIn BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE,
  displayName VARCHAR(50) NULL,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);
